zh.lifeSummary: 當Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief於大約1445年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief14歲，母親Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose12歲。他和Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1496年10月在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

nameMeanings.name: Odhar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire): variant of   Odom  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Odom
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘red’ in Hebrew), which was the byname of Esau. It was given to him because he was born covered with red hair (Genesis 25:25) or because he sold his birthright for a bowl of red lentil soup. This was frequently used as a given name in medieval Scotland, where it was taken to represent a variant of   Adam .  It is occasionally bestowed in modern times by parents with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief was born about 1445, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief, was 14 and his mother, Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose, was 12. He had at least 1 son with Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh. He died about October 1496, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief est né environ 1445, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose, avait 12 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh. Il est décédé environ octobre 1496, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief um 1445 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief 14 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose 12. Er hatte mit Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um Oktober 1496 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief è nato il circa 1445 nel Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh. Morì circa ottobre 1496, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chiefが約1445年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chiefは14歳，母Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montroseは12歳であった。彼はMarjorie Mackintosh of Mackintoshとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1496年10月にスコットランドアルグイルで52歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief(이)가 대략 1445년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1496년 10월 스컷랜드 아그이에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief родился около 1445 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lachlan Og MacLean 8th Clan Chief было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Campbell Countess of Montrose, 12. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh. Он умер около октябрь 1496 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.
